category_sources: Official GitHub repository describes tarsnapper as a tarsnap wrapper that expires backups using a GFS scheme; source_facts.description matches this.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository and source_facts.name use tarsnapper.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface with configuration, backup, and expiration usage examples.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository for miracle2k/tarsnapper; official repository page provides README and project metadata.
tags_sources: Official README explains tarsnapper backup expiration with deltas/GFS-style retention and command-line usage; source_facts.executables lists tarsnapper.
